steps.title: Keep subject with verb
steps.content: The complete subject is Her portrait of novelist Zadie Smith, and the verb is is displayed. Standard English does not place punctuation between a simple subject and its verb.

steps.title: Remove needless punctuation
steps.content: Choice A uses an unmatched dash, Choice B uses a colon after an incomplete clause, and Choice C incorrectly separates the subject from its verb with a comma. The answer is D.
